purpose: First faithful instantiation of Aplus_03 IFVG Flip (MASTER Family A untested, see tf_faithfulness_audit_v1). Run initially wired LAB + SAFE YAML variants; post-run correction: LAB/SAFE is a promotion tier not two configs. SAFE variant deleted. Reference playbook is Aplus_03_IFVG_Flip_5m (LAB-only).
git_sha_note: HEAD at run start. Uncommitted at run time: patterns_config.yml (ifvg.min_displacement_pct 0.05 -> 0.0005), playbooks.yml (+2 Aplus_03 entries).

Aplus_03_IFVG_Flip_5m.note: Renamed post-run to drop the _LAB suffix; same config.

Aplus_03_IFVG_Flip_5m_SAFE_deleted.note: DELETED from YAML post-run. Not representative of current signal. Reference only.

faithful: Detector: ifvg.py emits on 5m close invalidating a same-direction FVG
SL structural (SWING via pattern.price_level = opposite edge of invalidated zone)
LAB permissive (HTF bias OFF, ADX OFF, full 09:30-15:00), SAFE strict (HTF bias ON, structure trending, ADX >= 20, 09:45-12:00)
honest_approximations: Trigger A only (entry on invalidation close). Trigger B (retest into invalidated zone) not implemented in v1.
TP = fixed RR (2.0/4.0 LAB, 2.5/5.0 SAFE). MASTER transcript asks liquidity-targeting TP (next pool); not wired in engine.
HTF bias in SAFE = intraday pivot bias via market_state.py. MASTER uses D/4H draw-on-liquidity not implemented in engine.
patterns_config.yml::ifvg.min_displacement_pct set 5% -> 5bps (0.05 -> 0.0005). Justification in YAML comment: 5% unreachable on SPY/QQQ 5m.

gates.per_week_stability: FAIL — LAB flips jun/aug (+0.02) vs oct/nov (-0.07/-0.21); SAFE all weeks negative except aug (+0.001)
gates.exit_mix_sanity: 55% time_stop, 45% SL, 0% TP hit — confirms fixed-RR 2.0-5.0R unreachable (peak_R p80 = 1.06 LAB, 0.78 SAFE)
